sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 34:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 34:1
items.html: The part of SAG that is incorporated in the bottom Hey is called SAG of SAG, meaning the dots [Nekudot] of SAG that emerged as the bottom Hey in the Einayim, and YHV in the AHP. However, that part of SAG which not incorporated in the phase of bottom Hey is called tastes of SAG, or AB of SAG, or AVI. (Inner Light, Item 4)
